title: Build task review and unified diff flows
summary: Implement the review surface with unified diff rendering and review comments, reusing existing backend APIs where available.
scope: Unified diff renderer with hunk sections
Task review screen entry points from projects/tasks
Readability and performance tuning for medium-sized diffs
acceptance_criteria: Task review can load diff data from Sloppy
Added, removed, and context lines render distinctly
User can add a new review comment from the client
